# Saltgrass Modular

Custom modular construction company specializing in container homes, pools, and rapid deployment housing.

## Services
- Container Homes (320-960 sq ft, from $75K)
- Modular Pools (Tube Steel & Fiberglass, $12K-$36K)
- Traditional Builds & Design Customization
- Disaster Relief & Emergency Housing
- Government & Military Solutions

## Service Area
Primary: Oklahoma
Available: Nationwide for large projects
Emergency Deployment: International (FEMA-approved)

## Hours
By appointment — contact Dylan directly for consultations.

## Contact
- Phone: (405) 659-1949
- Email: Dylan.Walker@saltgrassmodular.com
- Website: https://saltgrass-modular.vercel.app
- Facility: Wagner, Oklahoma (15,000 sq ft)
